title: elaeagnus longipes var. ovoidea
intro: Elaeagnus longipes var. ovoidea is a variety of shrub in the Elaeagnaceae family, commonly known as silverberry or wolfberry, characterized by its silver-green leaves and white or pink flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Elaeagnus longipes var. ovoidea can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
